**SemaBuzz** is a free Windows desktop app for real-time encrypted 1-to-1 messaging. No accounts. No servers holding your messages. No surveillance capitalism. Text streams live as you type — character by character — over an end-to-end encrypted connection that disappears the moment you close it.

Every part of it — the protocol, the relay server, the Windows app — is built and maintained by me, in my spare time, for free.

---

## What your sponsorship funds

- **SemaBuzz for Windows** — continued development, new features, and bug fixes
- **SemaBuzz Relay** — the open-source relay server that makes connections possible; hosting, CI, and releases
- **SemaBuzz Protocol** — the open-source encryption and wire protocol library at the core of everything
- **Cross-platform work** — macOS and Linux clients are on the roadmap
- **Infrastructure** — domain, CI minutes, code signing, and distribution costs

I don't run ads. I don't sell data. I don't have a VC. Sponsorship is how this stays alive and free.

---

## About skynrlabs

skynrlabs is the one-person studio behind SemaBuzz. I care about building software that respects the people using it — tools that do exactly what they say, no more.

If that matters to you too, sponsoring is the most direct way to say so.
